title: NoTextureRestrictions
description: Minecraft mod that allows to load textures from any url
body:
# What's this mod?

NoTextureRestrictions lets servers send you custom textures, like player skins or other visuals without relying on Mojang’s texture servers.

It removes the built-in URL and signature checks, making it possible to use self-hosted or custom texture servers instead.

Perfect for private servers, modded communities, or setups where you want full control over how textures are delivered.

# How to use it?

## Client-side:
Just install the mod - no configuration needed.

## Server-side:
You don’t need to install anything.
If you, for example, have a player head that normally uses a texture from textures.minecraft.net, you can change the URL to any other host, and the client will still be able to load it.
